product_overview: TAMMAL is a multi-tenant, Arabic-first employee wellbeing and workload management SaaS that combines daily wellness check-ins, surveys, spiritual wellness tools, and enterprise task/workload capabilities with AI-powered insights. The platform is PWA-capable, role-gated, and built for tenant isolation and RTL-first experiences.
core_goals: Provide secure, multi-tenant employee wellbeing workflows (daily check-ins, surveys, mood tracking) with RTL and Arabic-first support
Enable enterprise-grade task and workload management with visibility, analytics, and AI-driven workload intelligence
Ensure robust authentication, role-based access control, and tenant isolation with soft-delete and audit logging
Deliver PWA experience, tenant-configurable branding, and accessibility across devices
Integrate AI features (question generation, reframing, spiritual insights) with governance, rate-limiting, and fallback providers

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login, invite-acceptance, and session management allowing users to sign in, accept invites, and access protected routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Enter email or social login -> Submit credentials -> See dashboard
Navigate to /auth -> Enter email or social login (invalid credentials) -> Submit credentials -> See authentication error message
Navigate to /auth/accept-invite -> Click Accept Invite -> Fill required profile fields -> Submit invite acceptance -> See account linked confirmation

features.name: Wellness Check-in
features.description: Daily mood and wellness capture allowing employees to select mood, answer follow-up questions, and submit a check-in that updates personal wellness history.
user_flows: Navigate to /employee/wellness -> Select mood emoji -> Complete follow-up wellness questions -> Submit check-in -> See check-in confirmation
Navigate to /employee/wellness -> Do not select a mood -> Submit check-in -> See validation error indicating mood is required
Navigate to /employee/wellness -> Select mood emoji -> Complete follow-up wellness questions -> Submit check-in -> See network error toast -> Retry submit -> See check-in confirmation

features.name: Workload Management
features.description: Personal command center for viewing assigned tasks and drilling into task details including checklists, activity timeline, and members.
user_flows: Navigate to /my-workload -> View task list -> Click on task for details -> Navigate to /tasks/:id -> See task details (title, checklist, activity timeline)
Navigate to /my-workload without authentication -> Redirect to /auth -> See login page
Navigate to /my-workload -> View task list -> Click on a deleted or inaccessible task -> Navigate to /tasks/:id -> See 'Task not found' or access denied message
